tools.name: start_trial
tools.description: Start a temporary, email-free Pulse trial. Returns a short-lived private API key with enough banked tokens for one short URL-based v1 analysis. No Stripe Checkout session is created. Store the key in the client or a trusted local environment; do not repost it in public logs, screenshots, GitHub issu

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Get the exact price to analyze an audio file before committing. Always call this first. Returns cost in dollars and a job_estimate_id valid for 30 minutes. Free — never charged.

tools.name: analyze_track
tools.description: Run audio analysis on a public audio URL. Requires estimate_cost to be called first (job_estimate_id). Requires PULSE_API_KEY. Before calling, you MUST confirm with the user that they have a lawful basis to submit this audio for analysis. For a user-requested folder, project, playlist, or batch, one

tools.name: request_payment_link
tools.description: Generate a one-time Stripe payment page for users without a Pulse account. Before calling, you MUST confirm with the user that they have a lawful basis to submit this audio for analysis; for a user-requested batch/folder/project, one confirmation can cover that scope. Present the payment_url to the

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.description: Check the status and results of an analysis job. Poll after analyze_track returns job_id, or after the user pays via request_payment_link. Returns full results when status=completed.

tools.name: get_token_balance
tools.description: Check the banked token balance for the authenticated Pulse account. Requires PULSE_API_KEY.

tools.name: list_token_packs
tools.description: List the available Pulse token packs (tier label, token count, price). Use before purchase_token_pack to show options to the user.

tools.name: purchase_token_pack
tools.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session for a Pulse token pack. Returns payment_url — DO NOT submit it programmatically; surface it to the user so they can complete payment in their browser. Once paid, banked tokens are credited automatically. Requires PULSE_API_KEY.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "estimate_cost" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Get the exact price to analyze an audio file before committing. Always call this first. Returns cost in dollars and a job_estimate_id valid for 30 minutes. Free…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "analyze_track" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Run audio analysis on a public audio URL. Requires estimate_cost to be called first (job_estimate_id). Requires PULSE_API_KEY. Before calling, you MUST confirm …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "analyze_track" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
